title: Yakirra majuscula
taxonomy: Yakirra majuscula is a plant that belongs to the family of flowering plants known as angiosperms. It is classified under the division of flowering plants called Magnoliophyta and the class of flowering plants known as Magnoliopsida. The order of plants that Yakirra majuscula belongs to is Asterales. Within the family Asteraceae, it is classified as the subfamily of plants known as Asteroideae. Yakirra majuscula is further classified into the tribe and genus level within the family Asteraceae, but the exact classification for these levels is not available.
constituents: Yakirra majuscula is a plant species, and based on limited information, its active constituents are not well-documented in scientific literature. However, some sources suggest that it may contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and other secondary metabolites. Further research is needed to confirm the exact composition and properties of Yakirra majuscula's active constituents. The plant's chemical composition may vary depending on factors such as the environment, climate, and soil conditions. More studies are required to fully understand the plant's bioactive properties and potential medicinal applications.
